revision.text:
<noinclude>
{| class="wikitable"
|</noinclude>style="background: #E7E7FF; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-planned" | {{{1|Scheduled}}}<noinclude>
|}

{{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude> {| class="wikitable" |</noinclude>style="background: #E7E7FF; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-planned" | {{{1|Scheduled}}}<noinclude> |}
{{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude> {| class="wikitable" |</noinclude>style="background: #E7E7FF; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-planned" | {{{1|Scheduled}}}<noinclude> |}
{{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
